report.summary: Day 52 standup v8: Full 6-agent rotation since v7. Build-v5 created DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming guides (2 new learn pages). Publish-v3 promoted Hyperliquid + Oracles → 396 slugs in code, queue refilled with DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming. Design-v5 polished both promoted pages (ARIA, accordion FAQ, touch targets). Community-v6 drafted FOMC eve social suite + Fear&Greed disconnect narrative (F&G rose 15→23). EOD-v5 confirmed 397 published, 2 in queue. BTC $75,273 (flat). FOMC meeting UNDERWAY — decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. F&G improved to 23 (still Extreme Fear). Git locks now ~20h stale, 552 uncommitted files. 33 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v7 Standup
items: BTC PRICE: $75,273 (unchanged from v7). Consolidating above $75K. 24h vol $62.2B. +25% from Feb $60K bottom. +3.8% 24h. +8.6% 7d. Market cap $1.5T.

FEAR & GREED: Improved from 15 → 23 (still Extreme Fear, but notable recovery). 38-day Extreme Fear streak — longest since mid-2022. BTC at $75K vs F&G 23 = significant price/sentiment divergence, historically bullish signal.

FOMC: Meeting is CURRENTLY UNDERWAY (Mar 17-18). Rate decision TOMORROW at 2pm ET, NOT today as previously stated. Powell press conference 2:30pm ET. Dot plot release. 92%+ hold probability at 3.50-3.75%. First meeting incorporating Iran conflict + Trump tariff impacts. Kevin Warsh nominated to replace Powell (term ends May 15). This is the peak search traffic window.
ETF FLOWS: $1.3B+ net inflows in March so far — potentially first positive month since October. 6-day consecutive inflow streak. Institutions accumulating while retail sentiment remains fearful.

PUBLISHED SLUGS: 396 counted in code (grep). Publish-v3 promoted Hyperliquid + Oracles. Build-v5 created DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming. Queue refilled: 2 new pages (DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming).

CONTENT PIPELINE TODAY: 10 learn guides built across all cycles (Runes, Farcaster, Stacks sBTC, Liquid Restaking, Monad, Smart Wallets, Hyperliquid, Crypto Oracles, DeFi Insurance, Airdrop Farming). 4 promoted to production. 2 in queue. 4 built but not yet queued.
API ROUTES: 5/6 public data routes healthy (unchanged). defi-yields still weakest (no fallback). Rate limiter exists but wired to 0/6 public routes.
GIT: HEAD still at cb65a9d (Day 42). HEAD.lock ~20h stale (Mar 16 11:17). index.lock ~19h stale (Mar 16 13:06). 552 uncommitted files. All deploys blocked.

sections.title: Project Manager — Status Since v7
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6 agents): standup-v7 → build-v5 → publish-v3 → design-v5 → community-v6 → eod-v5. Every agent type ran since v7.

SHIPPED SINCE v7: DeFi Insurance guide built (~2,800 words, 12 min read — covers coverage types, top protocols, costs, risks). Airdrop Farming guide built (~3,200 words, 14 min read — strategies, points programs, Sybil detection, scam prevention). Both with 4 FAQs and 4-5 internal links each. Hyperliquid + Oracles promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Both promoted pages UX-polished (ARIA landmarks, accordion FAQ, 44px touch targets, semantic nav, dark theme fix on Hyperliquid). FOMC eve social suite drafted (Fear&Greed disconnect, ETF streak thread, tax countdown, DCA signal, Pectra countdown). Fear&Greed SVG social card created. EOD-v5 QA audit passed.

BLOCKER P0 (8th consecutive standup): Git lock files — HEAD.lock ~20h, index.lock ~19h. 552 uncommitted files. ONLY Jefe can fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 2-minute fix blocking all deploys.
BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial status unknown/critical. If expired, all 396+ pages are dark during FOMC meeting day — the highest organic search traffic moment of the week.

CARRY-OVER: 102 phantom published slugs (no page.tsx). 2 real TS errors in crypto-index-funds-guide. 0/6 public API routes have rate limiter wired. ~155 pages missing OG metadata. structured-data.examples.ts rename needed.
QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages ready to promote (DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming). Promotion blocked by git locks.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 33 agent reports. 10 learn guides built. 4 pages promoted to production. 10+ pages UX-polished. 6+ SVG social cards created. 6+ social content suites drafted. 5 full QA audits.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION (CRITICAL, 8th consecutive standup): Remove git locks + resolve Vercel billing. 552 files trapped. FOMC meeting is UNDERWAY NOW — decision tomorrow 2pm ET. If Vercel trial expired, our FOMC guide + all 396 pages are dark during peak crypto search volume. BTC at $75,273 + F&G 23 (improved from 15) driving organic search spikes. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 52: batch commit' && git push. Combined fix time: ~2 minutes. Compounding SEO loss every hour. We are now 20+ hours behind on deploys.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE DEFI INSURANCE + AIRDROP FARMING: Queue has 2 fully built, QA-validated pages ready. DeFi Insurance ($3.5B market, <0.5% of DeFi TVL insured — massive knowledge gap) and Airdrop Farming (Hyperliquid $2.6B, Jupiter $600M+ — high search interest). Both have 4 FAQs, internal links, and Article JSON-LD. Promotion blocked by git locks — once P1 is resolved, run immediate publish cycle to push 396→398.

PRIORITY 3 — FIRE FOMC + FEAR&GREED SOCIAL CONTENT: Community-v6 has the full content suite staged — FOMC eve card, Fear&Greed disconnect narrative (F&G 15→23, BTC $75K, widest gap since Nov 2024 pre-$108K run), ETF streak thread (6 days, $1.3B+), tax countdown (28 days), DCA signal, Pectra countdown. Use EVERGREEN page links tonight (bloomberg-screener, dca-calculator, tax-guide) since FOMC guide isn't live. Hold FOMC-guide-specific tweets until deploy confirms.

STRATEGIC NOTE: F&G improvement from 15→23 while BTC holds $75K is a notable shift — historically, sentiment recovery while price holds precedes strong moves. The FOMC dot plot tomorrow will either confirm or negate this setup. Our content machine has produced 33 reports and 10 learn guides in a single day, but zero new content has reached Google since Day 42 (20+ hours). The content-to-deploy pipeline is the single highest-leverage bottleneck in the entire operation.
